description: You are a Preventive Medicine Physician at a state health department. You have drafted a policy brief on vaccine hesitancy, located at /home/ga/Documents/vaccine_hesitancy_brief.odt, which is currently open in Calligra Words. Format the References section to comply with APA 7th edition guidelines using the summary at /home/ga/Desktop/apa_references_guide.txt. The "References" label must be Heading 1 style. All 15 citations must be in alphabetical order by the first author's last name with hanging indents. Ensure journal names and book/report titles are italicized. Standardize the font to the document's serif font at 12pt, correcting any citations currently in Courier New or 10pt. Do not alter the body text above the References section. Save the document.

body_preservation_samples: public health interventions must be tailored
